case_title: ALI ANVARI VS. THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA et al
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: $335 FEE PAID BY PLAINTIFF ALI ANVARI

LAW AND MOTION 301, RESPONDENT THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AND COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION HAS RUN AS TO THIS DEFENDANT AND BECAUSE IN ANY EVENT, THE REQUESTED RELIEF IS NOT AVAILABLE FROM DEFENDANT. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780

KAREN W. YIU, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, (415)703-5385, FOR RESPONDENT/MOVING PARTY, THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION

THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AND COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION HAS RUN AS TO THIS DEFENDANT AND BECAUSE IN ANY EVENT, THE REQUESTED RELIEF IS NOT AVAILABLE FROM DEFENDANT.
